text.title: Capacity Fit Calculator Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Team has ≥4 sprints velocity history AND sprint planning happens?

branch.question: Scope measured in points/hours AND focus factor ≤0.85?
